from cadquery import Workplane

# Mechanical gear or sprocket with central hub and teeth
# Base parameters
outer_radius = 40
inner_hub_radius = 8
hub_height = 15
base_thickness = 5
tooth_count = 20
tooth_height = 8
tooth_width = 6

# Create the main gear body
result = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle(outer_radius - tooth_height)
    .extrude(base_thickness)
)
